item.title: Duplicate CLI port validation pattern repeated 8+ times in cli/index.ts
item.intent: CLI port validation is a single reusable helper. No inline parseInt+isNaN+process.exit pattern appears in cli/index.ts. All callers use the same validated function.
item.description: src/cli/index.ts repeats the same port validation pattern at 8+ sites: parseInt(opts.port, 10) followed by isNaN check and process.exit(1). The correct pattern already exists (lines 3183-3184) but is inlined everywhere instead of extracted. Key duplicate locations: lines 384, 1064, 1159, 1236, 1387, 1466, 1529, 1811. Each site duplicates the same error message and exit logic. Steps: (1) add a validatePort(portStr: string, optName: string): number helper function at the top of cli/index.ts or in src/cli/ux.ts that throws/exits with a consistent error message; (2) replace the 8+ inline validation blocks with calls to the helper; (3) run cli/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 1-2 files, ~30 lines removed net (replace 8 blocks of 4 lines each with single-line calls). DRY improvement — not a logic change.
